## Vibe-Trading [¶](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/\#vibe-trading "Permanent link")

- [concepts/vibe-trading/项目总览](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/concepts/vibe-trading/%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E6%80%BB%E8%A7%88/) — 开源金融研究 Agent 概览（19.8k⭐）
- [concepts/vibe-trading/技术架构](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/concepts/vibe-trading/%E6%8A%80%E6%9C%AF%E6%9E%B6%E6%9E%84/) — Agent 核心、68 工具、5 层上下文压缩、安全边界
- [concepts/vibe-trading/数据源与回测](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/concepts/vibe-trading/%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E4%B8%8E%E5%9B%9E%E6%B5%8B/) — 19 免费数据源回退链、7 大回测引擎
- [concepts/vibe-trading/因子库与Alpha研究](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/concepts/vibe-trading/%E5%9B%A0%E5%AD%90%E5%BA%93%E4%B8%8EAlpha%E7%A0%94%E7%A9%B6/) — 460 预构建因子、5 个 Zoo、研究实验室
- [concepts/vibe-trading/多智能体与交易诊断](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/concepts/vibe-trading/%E5%A4%9A%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E4%BD%93%E4%B8%8E%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E8%AF%8A%E6%96%AD/) — 30 Swarm 预设、Shadow Account 行为诊断
- [concepts/vibe-trading/安装与使用](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/concepts/vibe-trading/%E5%AE%89%E8%A3%85%E4%B8%8E%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8/) — 安装、CLI 命令、API 端点、安全配置
- [concepts/vibe-trading/MCP与生态集成](https://wiki.devtoy.xyz/concepts/vibe-trading/MCP%E4%B8%8E%E7%94%9F%E6%80%81%E9%9B%86%E6%88%90/) — 54 MCP 工具、IM 频道、券商连接器、定时任务
